headline: Trump 🍊👑 SMACKS Iran IRGC 💥🚀 AGAIN - Strait Drama 😱🛢️
text: US 🇺🇸💣 just YEETED 💥🎯 another round of strikes at IRAN IRGC 💂‍♂️🇮🇷 in Bandar Abbas port 🏙️🚢 – the SECOND smackdown in THREE DAYS 🗓️😤! Centcom 👨‍✈️🛡️ says they popped FOUR one-way DRONEZ 🛩️💥 threatening the Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢 and then blasted the fifth drone launchpad before it could BOOM 💥🧨! Iranian media heard the KABOOMS 🌋🔊 east of the city like a bad EDM drop 🎧😬! This all goes down while the ceasefire is hanging by a THREAD 🧵😰 and both sides are stuck in never-ending peace talks 🕊️💬 that feel like waiting for GTA 6 🕹️⌛! The three-month war has choked the Strait like a bad OnlyFans sub 😩🛢️ and sent global energy prices to the MOON 🌕📈! Trump 🍊🦅 told his cabinet that Iran is “negotiating on FUMES” 🛠️💨 and might have to “go back and finish the job” like it’s a Netflix series finale 📺🔥! He also told Gulf nations to hop on the Abraham Accords like it’s a group chat invite 📲🤝 while Israel and Hezbollah keep beefing in Lebanon 🕊️⚔️! Iran’s IRGC clapped back saying they downed a US drone and fired at jets like it’s Call of Duty multiplayer 🎮🔫 and vowed “we will not leave any act unanswered” – sounds like a Twitter ratio coming 🐦💥! Trump says the strikes are “measured, purely defensive” like a TikTok apology video 📱🙏 but Tehran calls it a “grave violation” 😡⚰️! Meanwhile the draft deal includes reopening the Strait and US troops pulling out 🪖🚪 but the White House says the text is “a complete fabrication” like a fake Gucci bag 👜❌! Trump warns if Iran doesn’t sign he might resume the full B-52 playlist 🎵💣! Negotiators told not to rush the deal like it’s a DoorDash order 🍔⌛ – either they lock it in or the US finishes the job like it’s a boss fight 🕹️🏆! Energy markets sweating harder than a crypto bro in a bear market 📉😓 while everyone waits to see if this fragile ceasefire survives longer than a Kardashian marriage 💍💔!
